title: ajania myriantha
intro: Ajania myriantha, also known as the Tibetan wormwood or Chrysanthemum morifolium var. myriantha, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ajania myriantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Ajania myriantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
